text.value: Classify the mental health services you provided:
Have you attended any health center?
Which district is the health facility located?
Where is the health facility located?
Please press the button below to capture GPS
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Do you often feel anxious, fearful, or nervous?
Ask their loved one about the change in behavior
For CHW: When asking these questions, make sure they are only asked for the past two weeks, not more than that period
I am referring you to the nearest health center, and I will follow up on the referral in a few days.
Have there been days when you couldn't sleep at all or slept too much?
What types of medications are you taking:
Do you feel sad, stressed, or hopeless?
Have you at times seen or heard things that other people do not see or hear?
Have you struggled to make decisions or take action?
Have you had thoughts that it would be better if you were dead, or thought about harming yourself or someone else in any way?
Have you felt tired, lacked energy, or lost interest in doing things?
Have you ever been unable to control your anxiety?
Elimu ya afya juu ya afya ya akili
Huduma ya kwanza ya afya ya akili
Ainisha huduma za afya akili ulizozitoa:
Huduma za ziada za kisaikolojia zilizotolewa
Je umehudhuria kituo chochote cha Afya?
Ni wilaya gani kituo cha afya kipo?
Ni wapi kituo cha afya kilipo?
Tafadhali bonyeza kitufe kilichopo chini ili kuchukua GPS
Je unakuwa ukihisi wasiwasi, hofu au wahka?
Muulize mtu wake wa karibu kuhusu mabadiliko ya tabia
Kwa CHW: Unapouliza maswali haya hakikisha yanaulizwa kwa kipindi cha wiki mbili zilizopita pekee, isizidi kipindi hicho
Nakupa rufaa kwenda kituo cha afya kilichopo karibu yako na nitarudi siku chache kufuatilia kuhusu rufaa.
Je baadhi ya siku ulikosa usingizi kabisa au ulilala sana?
Je unahisi kuwa na huzuni, msongo wa mawazo au kukata tamaa?
Je baadhi ya wakati ulikuwa ukiona au kusikia vitu ambavyo watu wengine hawavioni?
Je ulishindwa kufanya maamuzi au jambo?
Je ulikuwa na fikra za kwamba afadhali ungekufa, kujidhuru au kumdhuru mtu mwingine kwa njia yoyote ile?
Je ulijisikia kuchoka au kukosa nguvu na kukosa hamu ya kufanya jambo?
Hospitali ya wilaya ya Chake Chake
Huduma ya kwanza ya afya ya akili
Elimu ya afya juu ya afya ya akili

bind.relevant: /mental_health/mental_health/sad_stressed_hopeless = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/anxious_fearful_nervous = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/unable_control_anxiety = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/seen_heard_things = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/has_sleep_issues = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/tired_no_energy = 'yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/struggled_to_make_decisions ='yes' or /mental_health/mental_health/thought_of_self_harm ='yes'

selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/attend_health_center ,"yes") and (selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_island ,"unguja") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_island ,"pemba")) and (selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"wete"))

selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/attend_health_center ,"yes") and (selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_island ,"unguja") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_island ,"pemba") ) and (selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/facility_district ,"wete")) and selected( /mental_health/attend_hc/mental_visit_facility ,"other")
